# Microsoft Foundry

> Microsoft Foundry (formerly Azure AI Foundry) is a unified Azure platform-as-a-service for enterprise AI operations, model builders, and application development. It provides a comprehensive set of AI capabilities for building agents, deploying models, and developing generative AI applications with built-in enterprise-readiness including tracing, monitoring, evaluations, and safety controls.

Important information:

- Microsoft Foundry unifies agents, models, and tools under a single management grouping
- The platform supports two portal versions: Foundry (classic) and Foundry (new)
- Foundry projects are the recommended project type for building agents and working with models
- The Foundry SDK is available for Python, C#, JavaScript/TypeScript, and Java
- Documentation is now at https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/ (URL updated from /azure/ai-foundry/)

## Overview

- [What is Microsoft Foundry (new)?](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/what-is-foundry)

## Getting Started

- [Quickstart: Create resources](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/tutorials/quickstart-create-foundry-resources)
- [Quickstart: Chat with an agent](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/quickstarts/get-started-code)
- [Tutorial: Idea to prototype](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/tutorials/developer-journey-idea-to-prototype)
- [Use Microsoft Foundry with a screen reader](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/tutorials/screen-reader)

## How-To Guides

- [Compare models](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/benchmark-model-in-catalog)
- [Run evaluations from the SDK](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/develop/cloud-evaluation)
- [Run evaluations from the portal](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/evaluate-generative-ai-app)
- [View evaluation results in the portal](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/evaluate-results)
- [Run red teaming scans in the cloud](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/develop/run-ai-red-teaming-cloud)
- [Run red teaming scans locally](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/develop/run-scans-ai-red-teaming-agent)
- [Evaluation in GitHub Actions](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/evaluation-github-action)
- [Evaluation in Azure DevOps](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/evaluation-azure-devops)
- [Set up your developer environment](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/develop/install-cli-sdk)
- [Work in VS Code](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/develop/get-started-projects-vs-code)
- [Start with an AI template](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/develop/ai-template-get-started)
- [Microsoft Foundry SDKs](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/develop/sdk-overview)
- [Integrate with your applications](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/integrate-with-other-apps)
- [Create resources using Bicep template](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/create-resource-template)
- [Manage resources using Terraform](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/create-resource-terraform)
- [Upgrade from Azure OpenAI Service](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/upgrade-azure-openai)
- [Migrate from Azure AI Inference SDK to OpenAI SDK](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/model-inference-to-openai-migration)
- [Create and manage projects](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/create-projects)
- [Create a connection](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/connections-add)
- [Connect to your own storage in Foundry](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/bring-your-own-azure-storage-foundry)
- [Connect to your own storage for Speech/Language](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/bring-your-own-azure-storage-speech-language-services)
- [Manage quotas for Foundry resources](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/quota)
- [Hide preview features with Azure tags](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/disable-preview-features)
- [Configure private link](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/configure-private-link)
- [Managed virtual network](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/managed-virtual-network)
- [Network security perimeter](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/add-foundry-to-network-security-perimeter)
- [Store secrets in your Azure Key Vault](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/set-up-key-vault-connection)
- [Built-in policy for model deployment](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/model-deployment-policy)
- [Create custom policy definitions](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/custom-policy-definition)
- [High availability and resiliency](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/high-availability-resiliency)
- [Disaster recovery for agent services](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/agent-service-disaster-recovery)
- [Disaster recovery from a platform outage](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/agent-service-platform-disaster-recovery)
- [Disaster recovery from resource and data loss](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/agent-service-operator-disaster-recovery)
